title: Identity/IAM GPO Validation
summary: Submit evidence for applying and validating a Group Policy Object against a training OU or Windows client.
required_evidence: Event Viewer finding summary if troubleshooting was needed
mentor_prompts: Check OU placement before troubleshooting GPO.
Use gpresult or rsop.msc for validation.
Explain whether the policy applied or failed.
Identify blocked inheritance, security filtering, or DNS issues if present.
safety_notes: Do not apply restrictions to real production systems.
Do not submit sensitive account data.
